title: Add CustomerService.list_by_owner for owner-scoped customer queries
description: Add a new method list_by_owner(owner_id: int, tenant_id: int) -> ApiResponse on CustomerService. It returns all customers assigned to the given owner_id, scoped to tenant_id. tenant_id <= 0 returns empty items list for safety. The response data should be a dict with 'owner_id' and 'items' keys.
acceptance: 1) CustomerService.list_by_owner(owner_id, tenant_id) exists and returns ApiResponse. 2) Result data is a dict with keys 'owner_id' and 'items'. 3) tenant_id <= 0 returns empty items list. 4) Unit tests: test_list_by_owner_basic (owner with 2 customers, asserts set of names), test_list_by_owner_empty (no match returns []), test_list_by_owner_wrong_tenant (tenant isolation). 5) Full tests/unit suite still passes.
obsolete_reason: deferred while DB migration is in flight; will revisit after Task 1+
